### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Attributes](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Attributes.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Attributes')

## EventStoreDomainAttribute Class

Overrides the convention\-derived domain name for an aggregate or projection class\.
When applied, NamingConventionEngine returns this attribute's value instead of
deriving the name from the type name\.

```csharp
public sealed class EventStoreDomainAttribute : System.Attribute
```
